description: 50 curated seed artists for Lineage MVP. Covers 7 genre groups with intentional underground weighting. Known influences supplement API discovery — prioritising connections MusicBrainz and Last.fm are likely to miss.

lastfm_coverage_notes.hyperpop_digicore: GOOD — strong scrobble culture among PC Music / digicore listeners. Similar-artist chains are dense for Charli, A.G. Cook, Danny L Harle. Underground acts (Jane Remover, Alice Gas) return 5–10 similars.
lastfm_coverage_notes.rock_shoegaze: EXCELLENT — shoegaze/post-punk is the most data-rich genre on Last.fm. Every artist returns 15+ similars with high confidence.
lastfm_coverage_notes.rnb_alt_rnb: MODERATE — mainstream tier is well covered. Dijon, Mk.gee, Destin Conrad return ~5–8 similars. Jean Dawson is sparse (~3). MusicBrainz has solid R&B influence docs.
lastfm_coverage_notes.pop_art_pop: GOOD — Caroline Polachek, Rina Sawayama, Ethel Cain all return strong chains. yeule ~6 similars. Bladee covered under dark_plugg.
lastfm_coverage_notes.rap_mainstream: GOOD — mainstream hip-hop excellent. JPEGMAFIA, Navy Blue, Mavi drop to 5–8 similars but MusicBrainz has strong underground rap coverage.
lastfm_coverage_notes.underground_rap_plugg: POOR-MODERATE — osamason, BabySantana, Autumn!, Summrs have <5 Last.fm similars. This scene lives on SoundCloud. Lean on curated known_influences heavily for these artists.
lastfm_coverage_notes.dark_plugg_drain: POOR — Bladee and Ecco2k are OK (~8 similars). Cartier God, KanKan, Izaya Tiji are very sparse. Cash Cobain returns drill similars but not the sample-drill niche specifically.
